---
title: "resume"
format: html
---

# Talea Christensen

## Education

School: Brigham Young University - Idaho
Major: Bachelor of Science in Accounting
Minor: Finance
Clusters: Data Analysis and Financial Accounting
Expected Graduation: December 2026

## Skills

- Python
- Polars
- SQL
- Tableau
- Data Visualization
- Machine Learning
- Silver Lake
- Experience

## Experience

### Citizens Community Bank - Bank Teller
Ammon - ID
January 2024 - December 2024

### Crandall & Oseen - Tax Intern
Idaho Falls - ID
January 2026 - April 2026
